scripts.lint: npm -w budget-tracker-be run lint && npm -w budget-tracker-fe run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w budget-tracker-be run typecheck && npm -w budget-tracker-fe run typecheck
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm -w packages/backend run test && npm -w packages/frontend run test
scripts.docker:dev:migrate: bash ./scripts/docker-dev.sh exec backend bash -c 'cd /app/packages/backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate'
scripts.docker:dev:migrate-undo: bash ./scripts/docker-dev.sh exec backend bash -c 'cd /app/packages/backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo'
scripts.docker:prod: docker compose -f ./docker/prod/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env.production build --no-cache && docker compose -f ./docker/prod/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env.production up
scripts.knip: npx -w packages/backend knip && npx -w packages/frontend knip
